## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy, website status, and performance.](https://fathom.video/share/rKeDXwCxNVnNEj9Gfps7E6KHmghKrAQw?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Website publishing can resume;** most blog page bugs are fixed, and the remaining site updates are minor.](https://fathom.video/share/rKeDXwCxNVnNEj9Gfps7E6KHmghKrAQw?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [**New content strategy is live,** targeting document-heavy industries (e.g., manufacturing) and specific personas (e.g., project managers).](https://fathom.video/share/rKeDXwCxNVnNEj9Gfps7E6KHmghKrAQw?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [**November performance is strong,** on track to match or exceed October's metrics, driven by new topic clusters like "AI agents."](https://fathom.video/share/rKeDXwCxNVnNEj9Gfps7E6KHmghKrAQw?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [**Vivek is transitioning off the account;** Mara is now the primary GrowthX contact.](https://fathom.video/share/rKeDXwCxNVnNEj9Gfps7E6KHmghKrAQw?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)

## Topics

### Website & Newsletter Updates

  - [**Publishing:** Can resume, as the remaining website updates are minor and content-focused.](https://fathom.video/share/rKeDXwCxNVnNEj9Gfps7E6KHmghKrAQw?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [**Newsletter Sources:**](https://fathom.video/share/rKeDXwCxNVnNEj9Gfps7E6KHmghKrAQw?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
      - [**Events Calendar:** Kaitlin will provide the link.](https://fathom.video/share/rKeDXwCxNVnNEj9Gfps7E6KHmghKrAQw?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
      - [**Product Updates:** Source is TBD. Kaitlin will ask the team, as the existing Notion roadmap isn't suitable.](https://fathom.video/share/rKeDXwCxNVnNEj9Gfps7E6KHmghKrAQw?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
  - [**Programmatic Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/rKeDXwCxNVnNEj9Gfps7E6KHmghKrAQw?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Requires a call with Thiago to define the design, which depends on the new website theme being ready.](https://fathom.video/share/rKeDXwCxNVnNEj9Gfps7E6KHmghKrAQw?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
      - [**Requirement:** Web data support is also needed to modify the CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/rKeDXwCxNVnNEj9Gfps7E6KHmghKrAQw?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)

### Content Strategy & Performance

  - [**Editorial Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/rKeDXwCxNVnNEj9Gfps7E6KHmghKrAQw?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
      - [**Pillars:** Targeting document-heavy industries (manufacturing, insurance, construction, supply chain, commercial).](https://fathom.video/share/rKeDXwCxNVnNEj9Gfps7E6KHmghKrAQw?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
      - [**Personas:** Project Managers, Sales Managers, and Client Engagement Managers.](https://fathom.video/share/rKeDXwCxNVnNEj9Gfps7E6KHmghKrAQw?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
      - [**Rollout:** Phased over the next 2–6 months.](https://fathom.video/share/rKeDXwCxNVnNEj9Gfps7E6KHmghKrAQw?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [**Performance (November):**](https://fathom.video/share/rKeDXwCxNVnNEj9Gfps7E6KHmghKrAQw?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
      - [**Overall:** On track to match or exceed October's metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/rKeDXwCxNVnNEj9Gfps7E6KHmghKrAQw?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
      - [**Drivers:** Strong engagement from new topic clusters ("AI agents," "instruction topics") and healthy LLM referrals.](https://fathom.video/share/rKeDXwCxNVnNEj9Gfps7E6KHmghKrAQw?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)

### Team Transition

  - [**Vivek Shankar:** Transitioning off the Datagrid account to manage others.](https://fathom.video/share/rKeDXwCxNVnNEj9Gfps7E6KHmghKrAQw?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [**Mara:** Remains on the account and is now the primary GrowthX contact.](https://fathom.video/share/rKeDXwCxNVnNEj9Gfps7E6KHmghKrAQw?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kaitlin:**](https://fathom.video/share/rKeDXwCxNVnNEj9Gfps7E6KHmghKrAQw?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
      - [Provide the events calendar link.](https://fathom.video/share/rKeDXwCxNVnNEj9Gfps7E6KHmghKrAQw?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
      - [Identify the source for product updates.](https://fathom.video/share/rKeDXwCxNVnNEj9Gfps7E6KHmghKrAQw?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
      - [Notify GrowthX when the new website theme is ready for the programmatic pages call.](https://fathom.video/share/rKeDXwCxNVnNEj9Gfps7E6KHmghKrAQw?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/rKeDXwCxNVnNEj9Gfps7E6KHmghKrAQw?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
      - [Schedule the programmatic pages call with Thiago once the theme is ready.](https://fathom.video/share/rKeDXwCxNVnNEj9Gfps7E6KHmghKrAQw?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
